message:
Command `# Now check what step ID follows CheckAntennas in the pnr_run_v4 sequence.
# The flow goes: CheckAntennas → Checker.TrDRC → ...
# Restart LibreLane from Checker.TrDRC

DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from Checker.TrDRC \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane post-DRT PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid

sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log` executed with exit code 0.

extras.command:
# Now check what step ID follows CheckAntennas in the pnr_run_v4 sequence.
# The flow goes: CheckAntennas → Checker.TrDRC → ...
# Restart LibreLane from Checker.TrDRC

DESIGN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper"

nohup /home/user/.nix-profile/bin/librelane \
    "$DESIGN_DIR/config.json" \
    --flow Classic \
    --run-tag pnr_run_v4 \
    --from Checker.TrDRC \
    > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log 2>&1 &

echo "LibreLane post-DRT PID: $!"
echo $! > /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid

sleep 30
ps -p $(cat /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.pid) -o pid,stat,pcpu,etime --no-header 2>/dev/null || echo "ENDED EARLY"
tail -15 /tmp/pnr_v4_post_drt.log
